\tzpentry{ID5726}{Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5726 introduces Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi(\mathbf{x},t) = \Psi_{\mathrm{reg}}(\mathbf{x},t) + \Psi_{\mathrm{sing}}(\mathbf{x},t), \end{equation}
